case_title: NAVE, DENISE VS LEE, TERENCE OF/@ THE SHOWPLACE MOTORWORKS

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TERENCE OF/@ THE SHOWPLACE MOTORWORKS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY NAVE, DENISE AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, TERENCE OF/@ THE SHOWPLACE MOTORWORKS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1998 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NAVE, DENISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEE, TERENCE OF/@ THE SHOWPLACE MOTORWORKS PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
